name: Verify Admin can remove another Admin from organization
description:
Invite member with Admin role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can remove Admin from organization
descriptionHtml:
Invite member with Admin role.
Verify that:
- Admin can remove Admin from organization

retries.statusDetails:
AssertionError: [AssertionError] during step: <<User2>> :: Verify that Invited to organization page displayed
Message: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: <element(s) not found> 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for locator("h3").filter(has_text="You have been invited to organization")
